params.name: variant
params.description: Card variant: `basic` or `clickable`. Default: `basic`, unless the legacy `clickable` flag is set.

params.name: heading
params.description: Text to use within the heading. Ignored if `headingHtml` is provided.

params.name: headingHtml
params.description: HTML to use within the heading.

params.name: headingClasses
params.description: Classes to add to the heading.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Optional heading level. Default: 2.

params.name: href
params.description: Primary card link URL. Use this for clickable cards with a heading link.

params.name: description
params.description: Plain text card description. Ignored if `descriptionHtml` is provided.

params.name: descriptionHtml
params.description: HTML content to render inside the card body.

params.name: icon
params.description: Optional trailing icon configuration.

params.name: name
params.description: Icon sprite name.

params.name: size
params.description: Icon size. Default: 32.

params.name: title
params.description: Accessible title for the icon.

params.name: classes
params.description: Additional classes for the icon.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the icon.

params.name: dismissButton
params.description: Optional dismiss button configuration.

params.name: label
params.description: Accessible label for the dismiss button. Default: `Dismiss card`.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the dismiss button.

params.name: number
params.description: Large numeric value for dashboard-style cards.

params.name: tag
params.description: Tag macro options passed through to the tag component.

params.name: metadataItems
params.description: Optional metadata rows with icon and text.

params.name: icon
params.description: Icon sprite name.

params.name: text
params.description: Metadata text.

params.name: size
params.description: Icon size. Default: 24.

params.name: helperText
params.description: Supporting helper text below the main content.

params.name: helperHtml
params.description: HTML helper content below the main content.

params.name: actionLink
params.description: Secondary action link for the card.

params.name: text
params.description: Link text.

params.name: href
params.description: Link destination.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the action link.

params.name: imgURL
params.description: Optional image URL.

params.name: imgALT
params.description: Alternative text for the image.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the card.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the card.

params.name: clickable
params.description: Deprecated compatibility flag for clickable cards. Prefer `variant: 'clickable'`.

params.name: feature
params.description: Deprecated feature-card mode retained for existing toolkit consumers.

params.name: type
params.description: Deprecated care-card type retained for existing toolkit consumers.

params.name: HTML
params.description: Deprecated alias for `descriptionHtml`.
